stemHtml: Aircraft A has a lift-to-drag ratio (L/D) of 10:1, and Aircraft B has an L/D of 15:1. Which question correctly compares the two aircrafts' glide characteristics?

options.a: Aircraft A has a shallower glide angle.
options.b: Aircraft B has a shallower glide angle.
options.c: They both have the same glide angle.
options.d: There is not enough information to ascertain their relative glide profiles.
